description: First-principles calculations with ABACUS and LibRPA: GW quasiparticle band structures, RPA correlation energies, and related post-DFT workflows for molecules, solids, and 2D materials.

operations.name: gw_workflow
operations.description: SCF → DF → NSCF → LibRPA GW chain for quasiparticle band structures

operations.name: rpa_workflow
operations.description: SCF → DF → LibRPA RPA chain for correlation energies

operations.name: debug_workflow
operations.description: Failure diagnosis and repair for ABACUS/LibRPA computations

operations.name: feature_development
operations.description: New feature implementation in ABACUS, LibRPA, LibRI, LibComm, or pyatb

operations.name: build_workflow
operations.description: Compilation and toolchain setup for first-principles codes

operations.name: benchmark_workflow
operations.description: Numerical validation of new features against reference values

contracts.name: computation-workflow
contracts.purpose: Define and track the full SCF→DF→NSCF→LibRPA computation chain

contracts.name: development-task
contracts.purpose: Track software feature development with code location, build config, and validation criteria

contracts.name: calculation-debug
contracts.purpose: Record failure diagnosis, root cause, fix actions, and learned knowledge

contracts.name: compute-resource
contracts.purpose: Specify compute server, MPI configuration, and toolchain details

contracts.name: benchmark-report
contracts.purpose: Report benchmark results with test systems, convergence data, and pass/fail verdict

invariants.description: ABFS_ORBITAL files must be present if and only if use_shrink_abfs is true in librpa.in
invariants.failure_mode: LibRPA reads wrong auxiliary basis, produces incorrect polarizability
invariants.check_method: Compare ABFS file listing against librpa.in use_shrink_abfs field

invariants.description: ABACUS and LibRPA must be compiled against the same LibRI version
invariants.failure_mode: ABI mismatch causes silent data corruption or crashes
invariants.check_method: Compare LibRI_VERSION in ABACUS and LibRPA build logs

invariants.description: Deprecated ABACUS keywords must not appear in INPUT files
invariants.check_method: Scan INPUT against deprecated keyword list per ABACUS version

invariants.description: A minimal test must pass before any expensive GW/RPA calculation
invariants.failure_mode: Wasted compute hours on misconfigured runs
invariants.check_method: Verify smoke test workflow exists and all stages completed

invariants.description: Build toolchain must match runtime environment
invariants.failure_mode: Linking errors, wrong BLAS/LAPACK, incorrect MPI behavior
invariants.check_method: Compare module list and ldd output against build configuration

typical_equations: RPA correlation energy E_c = (1/2π) ∫ Tr[ln(1 - vχ₀) + vχ₀] dω

on_smoke_system.description: Minimal test: bulk Si 2×2×2, low ecutwfc, SCF→DF→NSCF→LibRPA
on_smoke_system.pass_criteria: All stages completed, no NaN, gw_band.dat exists

common_patterns.typical_cause: nspin mismatch between ABACUS SCF and librpa.in
Insufficient k-points for Fermi surface sampling
